annotation_basis: Independent human annotation from source O&M text only. Annotator did not consult pipeline extraction outputs. Task labels taken verbatim from O&M text.

concept_ground_truth.label: T1
concept_ground_truth.surface_form: On Aurex BatteryHub-612 LR, record coolant level, residue color, undertray wetness, recent chiller work, and whether the seepage already points to the left coolant-plate outlet before any shield or hose support is moved.
concept_ground_truth.reason: O&M step T1, diagnostic observation phase

concept_ground_truth.label: T2
concept_ground_truth.surface_form: Isolate the high-voltage pack, remove the local underbody shield, and expose the outlet quick connector, aluminum cooling-plate edge, hose support bracket, and nearby harness clip while keeping the hose angle unchanged so the original witness pattern remains readable.
concept_ground_truth.reason: O&M step T2, hardware access phase

concept_ground_truth.label: T3
concept_ground_truth.surface_form: Wipe only loose dirt, leave the wet boundary intact, and trace fresh coolant from the lowest drip point back toward the outlet tube bead, connector latch window, green O-ring land, and plate seam instead of assuming the largest stain marks the source.
concept_ground_truth.reason: O&M step T3, leak tracing phase

concept_ground_truth.label: T4
concept_ground_truth.surface_form: Cap the neighboring branch, apply pressure to the suspect cooling section, and hold long enough to see whether new wetting starts at the connector shell, the O-ring interface, the hose end, or the aluminum plate seam beside the outlet neck.
concept_ground_truth.reason: O&M step T4, pressure verification phase

concept_ground_truth.label: T5
concept_ground_truth.surface_form: Compare latch height, tube insertion depth, hose twist, and bracket side load with the opposite-side outlet branch, because a coupler body held off-axis by the support bracket often leaks while the plate seam stays dry.
concept_ground_truth.reason: O&M step T5, cross-comparison phase

concept_ground_truth.label: T6
concept_ground_truth.surface_form: Close the inspection only after the report names the exact leak boundary as coolant-plate seam, outlet O-ring seat, connector shell crack, or hose-end distortion, with the pressure result and residue path tied to that hardware.
concept_ground_truth.reason: O&M step T6, record closure phase
